title: Photosynthesis
description: It's all about the crops, seasons, animal care and the world of food!
body:
# Photosynthesis

Enhance your Minecraft world with the Photosynthesis Mod and explore new horizons in farming, cooking, and survival. Whether you're a seasoned farmer or a Minecraft newbie, this mod will add depth and excitement to your gameplay.

## Description:

Immerse yourself in a whole new level of farming and survival in Minecraft with the Photosynthesis Mod! This comprehensive mod introduces a variety of tools and systems to enhance your agricultural endeavors and create a more immersive gameplay experience.

## Key Features:

- New Culinary Tools: Take your culinary skills to the next level with tools like the cooking pot, skillet, mixing bowl, cutting board, mortar and pestle, milk separator, gravity press, drying net, and more.

- Cooking and Automation: Experiment with new recipes, and automate your cooking process by slot-locking certain tools with a wrench.

- Fluid Processing: Extract liquids like sunflower oil, canola oil, and olive oil with the fluid press. Create mead in kegs and satisfy your thirst with a dynamic thirst system.

- Animal Care and Enhanced Meat Drops: Keep your livestock alive by providing them with food and water, and in return, they'll reward you with a variety of meat cuts, including ham, ribs, brisket, and more.

- Leather Processing: Leather is no longer a simple drop. Process and cure it by salting and drying, transforming raw hides into usable leather for crafting.

- Seasonal Changes: Embrace the changing seasons as crops, trees, and foliage adapt to spring, summer, autumn, and winter. Witness unique tree textures, seasonal crop growth, and frozen biomes in the winter.

- Enhanced Tree Generation: Explore expansive, towering forests with completely overhauled tree generation. Easily navigate lush woodlands and experience the grandeur of larger, taller trees.

- Extensive Variety: Plant 92 new crops, including 14 flower crops, and cultivate 52 different tree types, each bearing fruits or nuts.

- Crop Mutation/Breeding: To get new crop species breed them with cropsticks. check REI for which crops to breed together! 

## Mod Compatibility: 
- Enjoy seamless compatibility with the Create mod, allowing for expanded crafting possibilities.
- RightClickHarvest should also work without issues.
- WTHIT will show you useful info on crops and animals.

**Incompatible Mods**
- [snow-real-magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/snow-real-magic)

## In-Game Guides:

- Install the Patchouli mod to access detailed in-game guides for information on tools, recipes, seasonal changes, meat processing, leather curing, and more.
- REI mod provides an easy and swift way to access and view recipes.

## Configuration Options:

Customize your gameplay experience with configurable options. Disable the thirst system, seasonal changes via the configuration settings. 

Conveniently adjust your configurations in-game using Mod Menu.

You can now also disable/enable animal hunger and thirst. This only affects Pig, Cow, Sheep, Chicken, Horse & Goats, all other animals work as normal/vanilla.

All settings except client settings are synced between server and client upon connecting.

## Known Issues:

You can only view "custom" recipes with REI. (JEI is currently not supported)

## Modpacks:

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack. You have my permission.
